common.appDescription: Your intelligent AI nutrition assistant for personalized health and dietary guidance

auth.headline: The intelligence that
auth.description: Experience an AI-powered nutrition assistant designed for your well-being. uWay Health provides personalized dietary guidance, smart meal planning, and actionable health insights tailored to your goals.

testimonial.author: Dr. Emily Chen
testimonial.content: uWay Health has transformed how I guide my clients. Its AI-driven meal planning and nutritional analysis are remarkably accurate and easy to use.

subtitle.login: Sign in to your intelligent workspace.
subtitle.register: Register for a free intelligent workspace.
subtitle.reset: Enter your email to reset password.

toast.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent, please check your inbox

featured.title: New in uWay Health
featured.subtitle: Discover the latest features for your nutrition and health journey.
featured.smartColorPickerDesc: Extract color palettes from images with WCAG contrast checking and CSS export. Essential for designers.
featured.batchImageCompressorDesc: Drag and drop to compress PNG, JPEG, and WebP images. Processed locally to protect your privacy.
featured.videoConverterDesc: Convert MP4, WebM, MOV and more directly in your browser — no server upload required.

imageConverter.title: Image Converter
imageConverter.description: Convert between PNG, JPG, WebP, and GIF with quality and size control.
imageConverter.pageDescription: Online image format converter, supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP and more

imageCompressor.title: Image Compressor
imageCompressor.description: Smart compression to reduce file size while preserving quality. Batch support.
imageCompressor.pageDescription: Online image compression tool, smart compression to reduce file size while preserving quality

colorPicker.title: Color Picker
colorPicker.description: Extract color palettes from images. Supports HEX, RGB, HSL with WCAG contrast.
colorPicker.pageDescription: Extract colors from images, supports HEX, RGB, HSL formats

imageCropper.title: Image Cropper
imageCropper.description: Crop images online with custom aspect ratios, rotation, and flip support.
imageCropper.pageDescription: Online image cropper with custom aspect ratios, rotation, and flip support

videoConverter.title: Video Converter
videoConverter.description: Convert MP4, WebM, MOV and more — all processed locally in your browser.
videoConverter.pageDescription: Online video format converter, supports MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI and more

videoCompressor.title: Video Compressor
videoCompressor.description: Compress videos while preserving quality. Supports custom resolution output.
videoCompressor.pageDescription: Online video compression tool, smart compression while preserving quality

pdfToImage.title: PDF to Image
pdfToImage.description: Convert PDF documents to high-resolution PNG or JPG images.
pdfToImage.pageDescription: Convert PDF documents to high-resolution PNG/JPG images, supports batch export

imageToPdf.title: Image to PDF
imageToPdf.description: Merge multiple images into a single PDF with drag-and-drop ordering.
imageToPdf.pageDescription: Merge multiple images into a PDF file with drag-and-drop ordering

pdfToText.title: PDF to Text
pdfToText.description: Extract text content from PDFs — copy or download instantly.
pdfToText.pageDescription: Extract text from PDFs, supports copy and download as TXT

pdfMergeSplit.title: PDF Merge & Split
pdfMergeSplit.description: Merge multiple PDFs or split by page range — processed locally.
pdfMergeSplit.pageDescription: Merge multiple PDF files or split by page range, processed locally

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Format, minify, and validate JSON data with syntax highlighting.
jsonFormatter.pageDescription: Online JSON formatter, supports formatting, minifying, and validating JSON data

regexTester.title: Regex Tester
regexTester.description: Test regular expressions online with real-time match highlighting.
regexTester.pageDescription: Online regex tester with real-time match highlighting

timestampConverter.title: Timestamp Converter
timestampConverter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable date formats.
timestampConverter.pageDescription: Online timestamp converter, Unix timestamp and date format conversion

base64.title: Base64 Coder
base64.description: Encode and decode text to and from Base64. Unicode supported.
base64.pageDescription: Online Base64 encoding/decoding tool, supports Unicode text conversion

qrcode.title: QR Generator
qrcode.description: Generate custom QR codes with color and style options instantly.
qrcode.pageDescription: Generate custom QR codes online, supports logo, color, and style settings

passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Generate secure random passwords with custom length and character types.

toolbox.title: 🧰 Online Toolbox
toolbox.description: Practical online tools, no installation needed, instant use, data processed locally for safety
toolbox.pageDescription: A collection of practical online tools including image converter, compressor, color picker, JSON formatter and more

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.startConversation: Start a conversation with the AI...

gatewayTest.title: Gateway API Test
gatewayTest.description: Test various features of the AI capability gateway

text.title: Sync Text Generation
text.description: Test text generation using POST /api/gateway/text/generation endpoint

stream.title: Stream Text Generation (SSE)
stream.description: Test stream generation using POST /api/gateway/text/generation/stream endpoint

image.title: Image Generation
image.description: Test image generation using POST /api/gateway/image/generation endpoint

settings.title: API Settings
settings.authDesc: Add to request headers: X-API-Key and X-API-Secret
settings.rateLimitDesc: Default: 100 requests/minute, configurable in the admin panel

help.title: Need help?
help.description: View complete API documentation and usage examples

apiDemo.title: API Client Demo
apiDemo.description: API client based on Axios with full TypeScript support

fileUpload.title: 📤 App User File Upload Demo
fileUpload.description: Supports server proxy upload and pre-signed URL client direct upload, compatible with Cloudflare R2 / AWS S3

clientExample.title: Client API Example
clientExample.description: Using React Query + Axios with auto caching, retry, and error handling

docs.title: 📚 Documentation
docs.description: Full API usage guide available in the project root

apiKeyConfig.description: Configure your API Key and Secret to use the Gateway API
apiKeyConfig.success: Config saved successfully! You can now start testing the Gateway API.
apiKeyConfig.hint: Note: Enter your API Key and Secret, save to start using the test features.

textGeneration.systemPromptPlaceholder: Define the AI assistant's role and behavior...

streamGeneration.systemPromptPlaceholder: Define the AI assistant's role and behavior...
streamGeneration.sseHint: Stream generation uses Server-Sent Events (SSE) technology to receive text fragments in real-time. You can click "Stop Generation" to interrupt the output at any time.

imageGeneration.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate in detail, e.g.: A serene landscape with mountains and a lake at sunset, digital art style...
imageGeneration.promptHint: Tip: Detailed English descriptions produce better results. Include style, color, and composition details.

testHistory.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all test history?
testHistory.emptyDescription: Start testing the Gateway API, history will appear here
testHistory.title: Test History

imageCompressor.title: Image Compressor
imageCompressor.description: Professional compression, comparable to TinyPNG, preserves original format and best quality
imageCompressor.clientDescription: Uses Canvas API, no upload needed, privacy safe
imageCompressor.serverDescription: Uses Sharp + MozJPEG + PNG quantization, comparable to TinyPNG
imageCompressor.qualityHint: Recommended 80-90%, PNG uses palette quantization automatically
imageCompressor.emptyDescription: Supports batch compression, server processing is more professional

presets.webDesc: Optimized for websites, small file size

colorPicker.title: Color Picker
colorPicker.description: Extract colors from images or screen, supports multiple color formats
colorPicker.dropOrClick: Drag and drop or click to upload image
colorPicker.clickToExtract: Click on image to extract color
colorPicker.paletteEmpty: Pick colors from image and add here
colorPicker.tipsImageStep3: Click on the image to extract color
colorPicker.tipsScreenStep2: Click anywhere on screen to pick color
colorPicker.tipsScreenNotSupported: Screen picking requires Chrome 95+ or Edge 95+
colorPicker.eyeDropperNotSupported: Your browser does not support screen picking. Please use Chrome 95+ or Edge 95+

imageCropper.title: Image Cropper
imageCropper.description: Upload an image to crop, supports mouse drag selection, custom size input, rotation and flip, all processed locally in browser
imageCropper.dragOrClick: Drag and drop image here, or click to upload
imageCropper.supportedFormats: Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP
imageCropper.tipDrag: Tip: Drag on the image to draw a new crop area, drag borders and handles to resize, drag the center to move

base64Tool.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64Tool.description: Encode and decode text to and from Base64, supports URL-safe mode and file upload

timestampTool.title: Timestamp Converter
timestampTool.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and date formats, supports time zones and time differences

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter
jsonFormatter.description: Format · Syntax Highlight · Minify · Tree View

qrcodeGenerator.title: QR Code Generator
qrcodeGenerator.description: Generate custom QR codes, supports Logo, color, and style settings
qrcodeGenerator.logoAutoCorrection: Uploading a Logo will automatically increase error correction level for scannability
qrcodeGenerator.downloadHint: PNG/JPEG for sharing, SVG for printing
qrcodeGenerator.tipContrast: Higher contrast between foreground and background makes scanning easier
qrcodeGenerator.tipLogo: Adding a Logo automatically increases error correction level
qrcodeGenerator.tipWifi: WiFi QR codes can connect to network directly
qrcodeGenerator.tipSvg: SVG format is suitable for large-scale printing

videoConverter.title: Video Converter
videoConverter.description: Supports MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI and more, processed locally in browser
videoConverter.loadingHint: First load may take a few seconds
videoConverter.dropOrClick: Drag and drop or click to upload video
videoConverter.supportedFormats: Supports MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, MKV and more (max 500MB)
videoConverter.processingHint: Processing video, please do not close the page
videoConverter.qualityHint: Lower value means better quality, larger file
videoConverter.privacyDescription: All video processing is done locally in the browser, nothing is uploaded to the server
videoConverter.errorFfmpegLoad: FFmpeg failed to load, please check your network and refresh the page. If the issue persists, try using Chrome or Edge.
videoConverter.errorInvalid: Invalid video file or conversion config
videoConverter.errorLoadFailed: FFmpeg failed to load. Please check your network connection and refresh the page. If the problem persists, try using Chrome or Edge.
videoConverter.errorConvertFailed: Video conversion failed. Please try another format or check the video file.

regexTester.title: Regex Tester
regexTester.description: Test regular expressions online with replacement and code generation support
regexTester.noInput: Enter a regex pattern and test text to see match results
regexTester.captureHint: Use $1, $2 etc. to reference capture groups
regexTester.enterPatternFirst: Enter a regex pattern to generate code
regexTester.tipStar: * matches 0 or more, + matches 1 or more
regexTester.tipGroups: () defines capture groups, use \1 to backreference
regexTester.tipAnchors: ^ matches start of string, $ matches end
regexTester.tipEscape: Use \ to escape special characters, e.g. \., \*
regexTester.tipClickPattern: Click a common pattern to fill in the regex quickly
regexTester.tipClickMatch: Click a match result to copy it
regexTester.tipReplace: Use $1, $2 etc. to reference capture groups in replacement
regexTester.tipDotAll: Enable the s flag to make . match newlines too

videoCompressor.title: Video Compressor
videoCompressor.description: Smart video compression while preserving quality, processed locally for safety
videoCompressor.loadingHint: First load may take a few seconds
videoCompressor.uploadInstruction: Drag and drop or click to upload video
videoCompressor.uploadHint: Supports MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, MKV and more (max 500MB)
videoCompressor.processingHint: Processing video, please do not close the page
videoCompressor.presetHint: Slower speed means higher compression quality
videoCompressor.tipBalance: For general videos, choose the "Balance" preset
videoCompressor.tipResolution: Lowering resolution can significantly reduce file size
videoCompressor.tipAudio: Removing audio is good for silent videos/GIFs
videoCompressor.tipCrf: Lower CRF value means better quality, larger file
videoCompressor.privacyDescription: All video processing is done locally in the browser, nothing is uploaded to the server
videoCompressor.errorLoadFailed: FFmpeg failed to load. Please check your network connection and refresh the page. If the problem persists, try using Chrome or Edge.
videoCompressor.errorCompressFailed: Video compression failed. Please check the video file or try different settings
